"[3] Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 1181 meters. Responders may need to search 30 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The user's device battery state is 61-100%. Their verified phone number is +18054208175. The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency."

"[2] his request is for SOMEONE ELSE. The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH. NO ONE is trapped. The person in need IS injured. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected. Two-way text with the user is now available."

"[48] [19:54:53 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] 2488724132 has entered the chat[19:54:53 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] 2488724132: PSAP: 789-2911. IF YOU HAVE ANY OTHER PROBLEMS OR QUESTIONS ONCE YOUR ARE IN CELL RANGE YOU CAN ALWAYS CALL US DIRECTLY AT 831-[19:54:54 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] 2488724132: Just an update. I'm still with the tourists that helped after I flipped my RV van. We are still heading north, and still no cell service. If you are not the[19:54:56 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] 2488724132: END OF TRANSCRIPT[19:55:18 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] mtrycacc1: mtrycacc1 transferring a text session call to mtrycahp1[19:55:20 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] 2488724132: people I was communicating with before, my name is Ramon Palacios and I flipped my RV Van on a dirt road deep on a mountain dirt road. I'm blocking traffic in[19:55:32 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] mtrycacc1: Transfer to mtrycahp1 success[19:55:34 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: mtrycacc1 left text session[19:56:03 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: both directions. When I get phone service I will call the tow service. The previous people I was talking with gave me their number [19:56:53 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Karen Billman has entered the chat[19:56:53 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Karen Billman: OK, DO YOU NEED ANY OTHER ASSISTANCE FROM THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL [20:00:49 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Karen Billman: HELLO , DO YOU NEED ANY ADDITIONAL ASSISTACE [20:01:51 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: No. I just don't know what I need to do. I am going to try to hotel and rental car - I'm from Michigan traveling with dogs. Left very important stuff in the [20:02:02 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: RV. [20:02:42 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Karen Billman: JUST TO CONTACT THE TOW COIMPANY and MAKE YOUR ARRANGEMENTS WITH THEM WHEN YOU GET CELL SERVICE [20:02:48 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: Have bad sos service [20:03:18 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: OK thanks [20:03:53 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Karen Billman: TAKER ALL PRECAUTIONS FOR YOUR SAFETY AND CALL OR TEXT BACK IF YOU NEED ANY ADDTIONAL ASSISTANCE [20:04:58 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: Thank you [20:05:57 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: I've said it before. I may be preventing people from coming down the mountain [20:06:05 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Karen Billman: I AM DISCONNECTING THE CALL Call initiated: 19:55:33 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026Phone number: (248) 872-4132"
"[46] AUTO CARE WILL KEEP TRYING TO REACH THE INV PARTY TO GATHER SPECIFICS AND ARRANGE THE TOW SERVICE / THEY WILL CALL US BACK WHEN THEY ARE ENRT TO THE VEH / PLACING THEM BOT FOR NOW"

"[44] Also have Insurance for later54 mins(248) 872-4132THEY REQUIRE YOU TO PAY UPFRONT AND THEN YOU SHOULD BE ABLE TO SEEK REIMBURSEMENT FROM YOUR INSURANCE53 minsSandra HamiltonVan. It's heavy49 minsOk49 minsOk47 minsApple Systems The user's device sent a location update: Latitude 36.0005 (N), Longitude -121.4765 (W). Search area +/-20 meters. Altitude 486 meters. Search height +/-30 meters. The user's device battery state is 31-60%.46 mins(248) 872-4132ARE YOU ABLE TO TELL ME MAKE , YEAR, AND MODEL OF YOUR VEHICLE41 minsSandra HamiltonIt's a 2025 Noovo Plus Class B RV based on RAM Promaster38 minsApple Systems The user's device sent a location update: Latitude 36.0017 (N), Longitude -121.5036 (W). Search area +/-10 meters. Altitude 52 meters. Search height +/-30 meters. The user's device battery state is 31-60%.30 mins(248) 872-4132JUST TO LET YOU KNOW WE ARE STILL WORKING ON YOUR TOW TRUCK.26 minsSandra HamiltonI've made it to CA 1. Got ride with my dogs. Trying to find any place I can stay. All my medications are in the Van. I was surprised no Patrol was on their25 minsway.25 minsI am concerned of people at top will not be able to get off the mountain because I'm blocking them24 mins(248) 872-4132YOU ARE IN A REMOTE AREA AND WE ARE WORKING ON IT ... PLEASE LET US KNOW WHERE YOU WILL BE FOR CONTACT OR THE TOW COMPANY MAY HAVE TO STORE YOUR VEHICLE24 minsSandra HamiltonGive them my name and number23 mins(248) 872-4132WILL YOU HAVE CELL SERVICE?21 minsSandra HamiltonAs soon as I find a place I'll contact you_- Communicating via satellite / works and mostly does not work21 minsTourist is driving north on CA 120 minsStill no cell service17 minsMy phone number is 2488724132 but have not been able to get service.15 mins(248) 872-4132WE STARTED AUTO CARE TOW BUT THEY DO NEED YOU TO BE WITH YOUR VEHICLE WHEN THEY RETRIEVE IT UNLESS YOU MAKE OTHER ARRANGEMENTS WITH THEM. WE PROVIDED THEM WITH YOUR NAME AND PHONE # AND LET THEM KNOW YOU WERE NO LONGER THERE. THEY TOLD US THEY WOULD ATTEMPT TO CONTACT YOU. IF THEY ARE UNABLE TO GET THROUGH TO YOU THEY MAY HAVE TO POSTPONE GETTING TO YOUR VEHICLE. YOU CAN CONTACT THEM DIRECTLY WHEN YOU ARE IN CELL RANGE AGAIN AT 831-789-2911. IF YOU HAVE ANY OTHER PROBLEMS OR QUESTIONS ONCE YOUR ARE IN CELL RANGE YOU CAN ALWAYS CALL US DIRECTLY AT 831-796-2160 AND REFERENCE CALL #: MY04335 minsSandra Hamilton"

Search height +/-20 meters.The user's device battery state is 61-100%.[17:44:46 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: My name is Ramon Palacios 248 872-4132[17:44:56 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: I've connected to emergency servicws[17:45:03 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Sandra Hamilton: HI RAMON, ARE YOU INJURED?[17:45:07 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: My name is Ramon Palacios 248 872-4132[17:45:22 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: No. [17:45:42 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Sandra Hamilton: OKAY THIS IS THE HIGHWAY PATROL AND WE HAVE AN OFFICER ENROUTE TO YOU[17:45:51 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Sandra Hamilton: DO YOU NEED A TOW TRUCK STARTED?[17:46:13 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: Y es - Translated to - And it is[17:46:49 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: Yes[17:47:13 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Sandra Hamilton: OKAY WE WILL START ONE, I JUST NEED TO CONFIRM YOU HAVE THE FUNDS TO PAY FOR IT[17:47:38 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: Blocking both sides of road / lane[17:48:06 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] (248) 872-4132: Yes [17:49:11 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026] Sandra Hamilton: OKAY I'LL START ONE FOR YOU NOWCall initiated: 17:30:13 GMT-07:00 29 Apr 2026Phone number: (248) 872-4132"
